properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Some large barnacles across carapace and plastron.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Due to lethargy and being abit underweight he was taken in for observation, AZWH contacted with images and details, they requested he be taken in to check for hook ingestion.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy dense algal coverage on carapace
Heavy algal coverage on carapace. Moderate barnacle coverage across carapace and soft tissues.

properties.injury_desc: Possible boat strike, prop cuts 3rd and 4th costals. Cuts appear to be approx 20cm in length.  QPWS ranger confirmed via phone call with MoP.

properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: I received a message at 4.10pm from Turtlecare with a request to collect the hatchling and take to Australia Zoo Wildlife Hospital. I arrived at the location in Buddina at 4.30 and transported hatchling to Australia Zoo arriving at 5.15pm

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Three small barnacles on the carapace.
Moderate algal coverage on carapace. Cluster of large barnacles on carapace. Small barnacles across soft tissues.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: Refer to info and photos also on sighting report I submitted

properties.injury_desc: Front left flipper missing. Jagged injury. Still raw and bleeding.

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy algal coverage across carapace, plastron, head and soft tissues. Barnacles present across body.
properties.alive_and_rescued_notes: SIGHTING: 230426NOS1  Placed in turtle sling then transport crate to take to Sealife. Freshwater poured over turtle to rehydrate and wet towel.

properties.injury_desc: No head, flippers or tail, most like predated/scavenged.

properties.crab_pot_additional_info: No rope, no tags, no float, fisheries advised to remove crab pot from beach and take to Urangan depot

properties.fouling_epibionts_desc: Heavy coverage of algae and barnacles across entire body.
